counting_basic.name: Counting and Cardinality
counting_basic.description: Count objects, understand that the last number said tells how many.

number_comparison.name: Comparing Numbers
number_comparison.description: Compare two numbers using greater than, less than, equal to.

place_value_basic.name: Place Value (Ones and Tens)
place_value_basic.description: Understand tens and ones. A two-digit number represents amounts of tens and ones.

addition_basic.name: Addition (Single Digit)
addition_basic.description: Add single-digit numbers. Understand addition as putting together.

subtraction_basic.name: Subtraction (Single Digit)
subtraction_basic.description: Subtract single-digit numbers. Understand subtraction as taking apart.

addition_multidigit.name: Addition (Multi-Digit)
addition_multidigit.description: Add two and three-digit numbers using place value understanding.

subtraction_multidigit.name: Subtraction (Multi-Digit)
subtraction_multidigit.description: Subtract two and three-digit numbers using place value understanding.

place_value_advanced.name: Place Value (Hundreds and Beyond)
place_value_advanced.description: Understand hundreds, thousands. Read and write numbers to 1000.

multiplication_basic.name: Multiplication (Basic Facts)
multiplication_basic.description: Multiplication as repeated addition. Fluency with facts 0-10.

division_basic.name: Division (Basic Facts)
division_basic.description: Division as equal sharing or grouping. Relationship between multiplication and division.

fractions_concept.name: Fractions (Concept)
fractions_concept.description: Understand a fraction as part of a whole. Numerator and denominator.

measurement_basic.name: Measurement (Length, Weight, Time)
measurement_basic.description: Measure lengths, weights. Tell time to the minute. Solve problems involving time intervals.

multiplication_multidigit.name: Multiplication (Multi-Digit)
multiplication_multidigit.description: Multiply up to four-digit numbers by one-digit numbers. Multiply two two-digit numbers.

division_multidigit.name: Division (Multi-Digit)
division_multidigit.description: Divide up to four-digit dividends by one-digit divisors. Interpret remainders.

fractions_equivalence.name: Fraction Equivalence and Ordering
fractions_equivalence.description: Explain why fractions are equivalent. Compare fractions with different numerators and denominators.

fractions_addition.name: Fraction Addition and Subtraction
fractions_addition.description: Add and subtract fractions with like and unlike denominators.

geometry_basic.name: Geometry (Shapes and Properties)
geometry_basic.description: Classify shapes by properties of their lines and angles.

decimals_concept.name: Decimals (Concept)
decimals_concept.description: Understand decimal notation for fractions with denominators 10 or 100.

fractions_multiplication.name: Fraction Multiplication and Division
fractions_multiplication.description: Multiply and divide fractions and mixed numbers.

decimals_operations.name: Decimal Operations
decimals_operations.description: Add, subtract, multiply and divide decimals to hundredths.

volume_concept.name: Volume
volume_concept.description: Understand volume as an attribute of solid figures. Measure volume by counting unit cubes.

coordinate_plane.name: Coordinate Plane
coordinate_plane.description: Use a pair of perpendicular number lines to define a coordinate system.

ratios.name: Ratios and Rates
ratios.description: Understand ratio concepts and use ratio reasoning to solve problems.

percentages.name: Percentages
percentages.description: Find a percent of a quantity. Solve problems involving percent of a whole.

integers.name: Integers and Negative Numbers
integers.description: Understand positive and negative numbers as having direction and value.

integer_operations.name: Integer Operations
integer_operations.description: Apply and extend understanding of arithmetic to add, subtract, multiply, divide integers.

expressions_basic.name: Algebraic Expressions
expressions_basic.description: Write and evaluate numerical expressions with variables. Identify parts of an expression.

equations_one_step.name: One-Step Equations
equations_one_step.description: Solve one-step equations using properties of equality.

statistics_basic.name: Statistics (Center and Spread)
statistics_basic.description: Recognize statistical questions. Understand center (mean, median, mode) and spread.

proportions.name: Proportional Relationships
proportions.description: Decide whether two quantities are in a proportional relationship.

equations_two_step.name: Two-Step Equations and Inequalities
equations_two_step.description: Solve multi-step real-life problems with rational numbers. Solve two-step inequalities.

geometry_angles.name: Geometry (Angles and Triangles)
geometry_angles.description: Solve problems involving angles, supplementary, complementary, vertical, adjacent.

area_perimeter.name: Area, Perimeter, and Circumference
area_perimeter.description: Solve real-world problems involving area and perimeter of 2D figures including circles.

probability_basic.name: Probability (Basic)
probability_basic.description: Understand probability as likelihood. Calculate probability of simple events.

functions_intro.name: Functions (Introduction)
functions_intro.description: Understand a function as a rule that assigns exactly one output to each input.

linear_functions.name: Linear Functions
linear_functions.description: Compare properties of two linear functions. Interpret slope and y-intercept.

systems_equations_basic.name: Systems of Equations (Introduction)
systems_equations_basic.description: Analyze and solve pairs of simultaneous linear equations graphically and algebraically.

pythagorean_theorem.name: Pythagorean Theorem
pythagorean_theorem.description: Explain proof of the Pythagorean Theorem. Apply it to find unknown side lengths.

square_roots.name: Square Roots and Cube Roots
square_roots.description: Evaluate square roots of perfect squares and cube roots of perfect cubes.

scientific_notation.name: Scientific Notation
scientific_notation.description: Express very large and very small numbers using scientific notation.

statistics_bivariate.name: Statistics (Bivariate Data)
statistics_bivariate.description: Construct and interpret scatter plots. Fit a linear model to data.

polynomials.name: Polynomials
polynomials.description: Perform operations with polynomials. Add, subtract, multiply, and divide polynomials.

factoring.name: Factoring Polynomials
factoring.description: Factor polynomials including GCF, trinomials, and difference of squares.

quadratic_equations.name: Quadratic Equations
quadratic_equations.description: Solve quadratic equations by factoring, completing the square, and the quadratic formula.

quadratic_functions.name: Quadratic Functions
quadratic_functions.description: Graph and interpret quadratic functions. Identify vertex, axis of symmetry, intercepts.

systems_equations_advanced.name: Systems of Equations (Advanced)
systems_equations_advanced.description: Solve systems involving linear and nonlinear equations. Substitution and elimination.

rational_expressions.name: Rational Expressions
rational_expressions.description: Simplify, add, subtract, multiply, and divide rational expressions.

radical_expressions.name: Radical Expressions
radical_expressions.description: Simplify, add, subtract, multiply radical expressions. Rationalize denominators.

exponential_functions.name: Exponential Functions
exponential_functions.description: Model with exponential functions. Understand growth and decay. Graph exponential functions.

logarithms.name: Logarithms
logarithms.description: Understand logarithm as the inverse of exponentiation. Properties of logarithms.

geometry_proofs.name: Geometry (Proofs and Congruence)
geometry_proofs.description: Prove geometric theorems. Understand congruence and similarity of triangles.

trigonometry_basic.name: Trigonometry (Right Triangles)
trigonometry_basic.description: Define trigonometric ratios. Use sine, cosine, tangent to solve right triangles.

trigonometric_functions.name: Trigonometric Functions
trigonometric_functions.description: Extend trigonometry to the unit circle. Graph and interpret trig functions.

trigonometric_identities.name: Trigonometric Identities
trigonometric_identities.description: Prove and apply trigonometric identities including Pythagorean and angle addition formulas.

statistics_advanced.name: Statistics (Inference and Distributions)
statistics_advanced.description: Normal distributions. Sampling distributions. Confidence intervals. Hypothesis testing.

probability_advanced.name: Probability (Compound and Conditional)
probability_advanced.description: Addition and multiplication rules. Conditional probability. Bayes theorem introduction.

complex_numbers.name: Complex Numbers
complex_numbers.description: Know there is a complex number i such that i²=-1. Add, subtract, multiply complex numbers.

sequences_series.name: Sequences and Series
sequences_series.description: Arithmetic and geometric sequences. Finite and infinite geometric series. Sigma notation.

limits.name: Limits (Introduction)
limits.description: Understand the concept of a limit. Calculate limits graphically, numerically, algebraically.

derivatives.name: Derivatives
derivatives.description: Understand the derivative as a rate of change. Differentiation rules including chain rule.

derivative_applications.name: Derivative Applications
derivative_applications.description: Use derivatives to find extrema, concavity, related rates, and optimization.

integrals.name: Integrals
integrals.description: Understand the integral as accumulated change. Fundamental Theorem of Calculus. Basic techniques.

integral_applications.name: Integral Applications
integral_applications.description: Use integrals to find area, volume, and solve real-world accumulation problems.
